1.2.7.name: com.vrchat.clientsim
1.2.7.description: VRChat Client Simulator for testing SDK3 worlds in Unity.

samples.description: An example of a world test using the Test Framework included in ClientSim. Automate interactions in your world and verify the results. Currently requires knowledge of C# and Unity Testing.
Tests to ensure ClientSim works as expected. Includes: Respawn test.
